prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为1824→1627→1760→1737→1935名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2025年基准位次约1935名，较2024年（1737名）后移约198 名，为近5年最高位次；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为14人，2025年增至17人，2026年计划18人，较2025年再扩招1人（+5.9%）。扩 招使竞争略有缓解，但扩招幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国农业大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第30名→2026年第24名，排名 稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强；2024年声誉评价为明显负面，主要因招生沟通不畅、专业设置不合理导致投档线暴跌约500名；2025年已回升至1935名，负 面舆情影响逐步消化。抖音热度排名总榜第13位（高热），食堂话题爆火，整体曝光度较高。2026年声誉文件中未直接涉及该校；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共7 个：作物学A+、兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、草学A+、食品科学与工程A+、植物保护A、生物学A。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；农学、动物医学等农林类专业热度相对平稳。海南省考生总数从2025年67,408人增至2026年约78,000人（+15 .7%），竞争明显加剧。；中国农业大学位于北京，对海南考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在海南省招生人数较少（约17–18 人），招生占比极小，地域偏好对位次影响有限；农学、动物医学、食品科学等王牌专业对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1935名、2026年扩招1人（+5.9%）使位次数字增大、海南省考生总数大幅增加（+15.7%） 使竞争加剧、学校排名持续上升增强吸引力等因素，预测2026年最低录取位次约1973名，区间1673–2273名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1673–2273名内，建议以二档专业（农学、食品科学、植物保护）为主攻方向，一档专业（理科试验班、动物医学）作为冲刺，三档专业（动物科学、机械类）作 为保底。位次优于区间下限（<1673名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Comprehensive category in Hainan Province were 1824 → 1627 → 1760 → 1737 → 1935, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1935, which is about 198 places behind 2024 (1737), marking the highest ranking in the past five years. The enrollment plan for this university in Hainan Province's Comprehensive category was 14 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 17 in 2025, and planned to be 18 in 2026, an additional expansion of 1 student (+5.9%) compared to 2025. The expansion slightly eases competition, but the extent is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China Agricultural University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising, from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, reflecting the enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength. In 2024, its reputation evaluation was significantly negative, mainly due to poor admission communication and unreasonable major settings, causing a sharp drop of about 500 places in the admission threshold. By 2025, it had recovered to 1935, with the negative public opinion gradually being absorbed. On Douyin, it ranks 13th in overall popularity (high heat), with cafeteria topics going viral, resulting in high overall exposure. The 2026 reputation document does not directly involve this university. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 7 disciplines rated A- or above: Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Husbandry A+, Grass Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, and Biology A.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. Agricultural and forestry majors like Agronomy and Veterinary Medicine have relatively stable popularity. The total number of examinees in Hainan Province increased from 67,408 in 2025 to approximately 78,000 in 2026 (+15.7%), significantly intensifying competition. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Hainan examinees. However, the university enrolls a small number of students in Hainan Province (about 17–18), making the enrollment proportion very small, and regional preference has a limited impact on rankings. Flagship majors such as Agronomy, Veterinary Medicine, and Food Science have strong appeal to examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1935, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 1 student (+5.9%) causing the ranking number to increase, the significant increase in the total number of examinees in Hainan Province (+15.7%) intensifying competition, and the continuous rise in the university's ranking enhancing its appeal, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 1973, with a range of 1673–2273.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 1673–2273, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Agronomy, Food Science, Plant Protection) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Science Experimental Class, Veterinary Medicine) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Animal Science, Mechanical Class) as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<1673), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
